title: cicer microphyllum
intro: Cicer microphyllum, also known as the small chickpea or chickpea of the woods, is a plant species in the Fabaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cicer microphyllum include its ability to lower blood sugar levels and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to treat various digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
